'''tasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deabstraction|deabstraction]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deabstraction|deabstraction]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tasaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæsækæth|tæsækæth]] || [[word:tæsækæj|tæsækæj]] || [[word:tæsækæsh|tæsækæsh]] || [[word:tæsækæ|tæsækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasasakath|tasasakath]] || [[word:tasasakaj|tasasakaj]] || [[word:tasasakash|tasasakash]] || [[word:tasasaka|tasasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasakath|tasakath]] || [[word:tasakaj|tasakaj]] || [[word:tasakash|tasakash]] || [[word:tasaka|tasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasafkath|tasafkath]] || [[word:tasafkaj|tasafkaj]] || [[word:tasafkash|tasafkash]] || [[word:tasafkaf|tasafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tasakatha|tasakatha]] || [[word:tasakaja|tasakaja]] || [[word:tasakasha|tasakasha]] || [[word:tasakaka|tasakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tasakath|tasakath]] || [[word:tasakaj|tasakaj]] || [[word:tasakash|tasakash]] || [[word:tasaka|tasaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tasakathal|tasakathal]] || [[word:tasakajal|tasakajal]] || [[word:tasakashal|tasakashal]] || [[word:tasakakal|tasakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tasakathatha|tasakathatha]] || [[word:tasakajaja|tasakajaja]] || [[word:tasakashasha|tasakashasha]] || [[word:tasakaka|tasakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tasakathan|tasakathan]] || [[word:tasakajan|tasakajan]] || [[word:tasakashan|tasakashan]] || [[word:tasakakan|tasakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tasakathaoro|tasakathaoro]] || [[word:tasakajaoro|tasakajaoro]] || [[word:tasakashaoro|tasakashaoro]] || [[word:tasakakaoro|tasakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
